THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP , A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CREATE MORE, INC. , A NEVADA CORPORATION PALACIOS, ALBERTO , AN INDIVIDUAL $16,421.04 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,421.04, ** PLUS INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% PER YEAR FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE** SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. WOOD ROBBINS IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST RESPONDENTS CREATE MORE, INC,. AND ALBERTO PALACIOS IN THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $16,421.04 PLUS COSTS PER THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS PROCEDURE. ORDER AND JUDGEMENT ARE FILED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Diana Fung, Esq. 415-247-7900 of Wood Robbins LLP for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioner Wood Robbins, LLP's motion to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. Wood Robbins is entitled to judgment in its favor and against respondents Create More, Inc,. and Alberto Palacios in the principal amount of $16,421.04 plus costs per the memorandum of costs procedure.

Order and Judgement are filed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
